creator: debdrup@freebsd.org
text:
Doesn't ue.4 just need to redirect to cdce.4?
The only sysctl in the net.ue OID namespace is the parent device, which provides all of the actual functionality.

cdce(4) looks to me to be what people might be seeking for this device; https://man.freebsd.org/cdce(4) definitely has all of the information you're asking for, as far as I can spot.
